taskTitle: Read a foundational aqidah text (e.g., Al-Aqidah al-Tahawiyyah)
subtaskTitle: Read the section on prophethood and revelation
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Read the section on prophethood and revelation' under the parent task 'Read a foundational aqidah text (e.g., Al-Aqidah al-Tahawiyyah)' (module: faith_shahada_growth), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah Ash-Shura 42:51 detailing the modes of divine communication and Surah Al-Ahzab 33:40 establishing the seal of the prophets, that contextually anchor the theological study of prophethood and revelation?

Which authentic narrations, particularly the detailed account of the commencement of revelation (Wahy) found in Sahih al-Bukhari 3 or the explicit hadiths affirming the finality of messengership in Sahih Muslim, directly anchor the foundational aqidah texts concerning the prophets?
